title: The Hal Roach Comedy Carnival
writer: Arnold Belgard, Dorothy Davenport, Jack Jevne
actors: Frances Rafferty, Larry Olsen, Eilene Janssen
plot: To quote a Marine D.I. in San Diego or John Wayne in several movies, "Listen up, we ain't going to plow this ground twice." In 1947, Hal Roach made a film called "Curley", which was an expanded version of 1930's "Our Gang" short "...
